name: data-warehouse-analytics-quota-manager
description: T187 QuotaManager — QUERY_ENGINE archetype (INLINE SERVICE). F426 does NOT exist. Instantiated directly in T173 constructor — NOT factory-injected. quota check before warehouse read. recordUsage after successful execution.

nodes.description: Iron rule validation + DNA compliance check: T187 instantiated directly in T173 constructor (NOT @Inject), F426 does NOT exist (reject if referenced), checkQuota before execution, recordUsage after success
Retrieve QUERY_ENGINE arch pattern + inline-service-constructor + quota-check-first + record-usage-after + no-f426 patterns for T187

Break T187 into: define QuotaManager class with checkQuota() and recordUsage() methods → T173 instantiates with new QuotaManager(db) in constructor → checkQuota() reads quota from DATABASE → recordUsage() increments usage counter after successful execution

Generate quota-manager.service.ts — QuotaManager class NOT decorated with @Injectable(). Instantiated directly: constructor(private db: IDatabaseService) { this.quotaManager = new QuotaManager(db); } in T173. F426 does NOT exist — any reference to F426 is a bug. checkQuota(tenantId, queryUnits) returns QUOTA_EXCEEDED DataProcessResult if over limit. recordUsage() called AFTER successful query execution.
Named check validation: not_injectable_decorator, instantiated_in_t173_constructor, no_f426_reference, check_quota_before_execution, record_usage_after_success
Score generated code 0-100 against T187 iron rules: no @Injectable, constructor instantiation, no F426, quota-before/usage-after order
Route: score >= 85 → n8 promote, score < 85 → n3 iterate

DPO triple: chosen=no-injectable+constructor-instantiation+no-f426+quota-before-usage-after, rejected=@Injectable-decorator OR @Inject-in-t173 OR f426-referenced OR usage-before-quota. curriculumTier=2.

entry: INLINE SERVICE — called by T173 constructor (no @EventPattern)
